tagline: Software that feels as good as it performs

footer.description: Opero Malaysia: we design and ship mobile apps, web products, portals, and business systems—with clear communication from discovery to launch.

home.heroTitle: Better digital experiences for your customers
home.heroSubtitle: From mobile and web to portals and core systems—we build software that improves how people interact with your business, and we stay with you through delivery and beyond.
home.servicesLead: End-to-end delivery aligned to your goals—UX, engineering, and sustainable operations.
home.processLead: A straightforward partnership focused on outcomes and measurable customer experience.

discover.title: Discover
discover.text: We clarify goals, users, constraints, and success metrics before writing code.

design.title: Design & build
design.text: Iterative UX and engineering with reviews you can follow—no black box.

ship.title: Ship & improve
ship.text: Launch with confidence; monitor, refine, and scale based on real usage.

home.closingHeading: Ready to improve your customer journey?
home.closingText: Tell us about your product or internal system—we’ll respond with next steps.

services.indexDescription: Mobile apps, web platforms, portals, systems, and strategic IT consulting.
services.indexHeading: Solutions that match your stack and your roadmap
services.indexLead: Pick a capability to see how we help teams deliver reliable, user-centered software.

summaries.mobile: Native and cross-platform apps with polished UX and real-world analytics.
summaries.web: Marketing sites and web apps tuned for speed, SEO, and accessibility.
summaries.portal: Self-service and B2B portals with roles, workflows, and clarity.
summaries.systems: Business systems, integrations, and automation you can operate with confidence.
summaries.consulting: Architecture, assessments, and roadmaps aligned to your outcomes.

mobile.title: Mobile app development
mobile.intro: Native and cross-platform apps with polished UX, offline-aware flows, and analytics hooks so you understand real-world usage.
bullets: iOS and Android with maintainable architectures
App Store and Play release support

web.title: Web development
web.intro: Fast, accessible marketing sites and complex web apps—SSR or SPA where it makes sense, always optimized for SEO and Core Web Vitals.
bullets: Integrations with APIs, auth, and payments
Hosting and CI patterns that fit your team

portal.title: Portal development
portal.intro: Self-service and B2B portals that reduce support load: accounts, documents, workflows, and role-based access your users actually understand.
bullets: Bulk operations and imports where needed

systems.title: System development
systems.intro: Line-of-business systems, integrations, and automation—reliable backends, clear data models, and operational tooling.

consulting.title: IT consulting & solutions
consulting.intro: Architecture reviews, vendor-neutral technology choices, security and compliance awareness, and roadmaps that connect business goals to delivery.
bullets: Technical assessments and proof of concepts

about.title: About Opero
about.description: Who we are and why customer experience drives our work.
about.heading: Software partners, not ticket takers
about.lead: Opero helps organizations in Malaysia ship digital products and internal tools that people enjoy using. We believe great customer experience (CX) comes from clarity, performance, and respectful design—not buzzwords.
about.body1: Our team blends product thinking with solid engineering. Whether you need a customer-facing app, an employee portal, or a backbone system, we align technical decisions with how real users work.
about.body2: We’re set up for long-term collaboration: readable codebases, handover-friendly docs, and pragmatic processes so your own team can own the roadmap when you’re ready.

cx.title: Customer experience first
cx.text: We measure success by outcomes for your users and stakeholders—not feature counts alone.

clarity.title: Transparency
clarity.text: You’ll always know status, trade-offs, and risks; no surprises at launch.

quality.title: Lasting quality
quality.text: We build for maintainability so your product can evolve for years.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Reach Opero for project inquiries and consulting.
contact.heading: Let’s talk
contact.lead: Share a bit about your goals—we’ll get back with questions, a rough timeline, or a call.
